executive_summary: On March 28, 2026, OFAC removed 4 entities from the sanctions list, including individuals and an entity associated with Ukraine and Russia. The removals are part of the GLOMAG and RUSSIA-EO14024 programs. No additions or updates were made to the list.

risk_implications.description: The removal of these entities may indicate a shift in US foreign policy or a decrease in the perceived threat posed by these individuals and entities
Companies should review their sanctions screening processes to ensure they are no longer flagging these removed entities

compliance_recommendations: Review sanctions screening processes to ensure removed entities are no longer flagged
Update internal watchlists to reflect changes to the OFAC sanctions list
Conduct due diligence on new and existing customers to ensure compliance with US sanctions regulations
